title: podocarpus oleifolius subsp. costaricensis
intro: Podocarpus oleifolius subsp. costaricensis is a subspecies of the Podocarpus oleifolius plant, a type of coniferous evergreen native to Central America, particularly in Costa Rica. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. In herbal medicine, Podocarpus oleifolius subsp. costaricensis is often prepared as an infusion or decoction to be consumed as a tea, or as a tincture for topical application.
